title: oudemansia viscida
intro: Oudemansia viscida, also known as the sticky trap plant, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oudemansia viscida are said to include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
